data.title: Galaxy warns Senate crypto bill may expand Treasury's power, allowing freezing transactions & deploying Patriot Act tactics.
data.description: Galaxy has reported that the proposed crypto market structure bill will grant the US Treasury enhanced authority to freeze transactions and utilize measures akin to the Patriot Act.

data.title: Goliath Resources to showcase at AME Roundup with Booth #1026C, VRIC Booth #131, and Metals Investors Forum. Expanding high-grade gold Surebet Discovery at Golddigger Property with 91,518 hectares in Golden Triangle, BC, near Red Line. Controls 56km of Red Line geologic contact.
data.description: In Toronto on January 14, 2026, Goliath Resources Limited, trading on TSX-V as GOT, on OTCQB as GOTRF, and on FSE as B4IF, is dedicated to expanding its high-grade gold Surebet Discovery at the Golddigger Property. The property spans 91,518 hectares in the Eskay Rift, located within 3 kilometers of the Red Line in British Columbia's Golden Triangle. This region, near the Red Line, has been home to top Canadian gold mines such as Eskay Creek, Premier, and Snip. Notable deposits in the Golden Triangle also include Brucejack, Copper Canyon, Galore Creek, Granduc, KSM, Red Chris, and Schaft Creek. Goliath has control over 56 kilometers of the Red Line, marking the geological contact between Triassic Stuhini rocks and Jurassic Hazelton rocks crucial for gold-copper-silver mineralization exploration.

data.title: Eric Norton from Bullen Ultrasonics will speak at CMS conference about ultrasonic machining of CMCs, shaping advanced materials manufacturing. Eaton, Ohio, on Jan. 14, 2026. #precisionmachining #advancedceramics
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in EATON, Ohio, a comprehensive presentation will delve into the key technologies revolutionizing advanced materials manufacturing. The discussion will cover grinding, ultrasonic, and laser micromachining methods. Bullen Ultrasonics, known for its expertise in precision machining of advanced ceramics and glass, will be a focal point of this event. The company will showcase its innovative approaches that are shaping the future of manufacturing.

data.title: Museum of Art + Light uses 100+ Epson Laser Projectors for 37,000 sq ft of vivid visuals. Calif-based vision-tech.
data.description: More than 100 Epson laser projectors are being used to showcase creative visions with nearly 37,000 square linear feet of vibrant color and intricate detail. This initiative, based in Los Alamitos, California, commenced on January 14, 2026. These projectors are significantly enhancing the visual experience in museums, contributing to the advancement of public learning and culture.

data.title: Manus introduces AI Meeting Minutes feature for in-person recording, with speaker recognition and summaries.
data.description: Manus has introduced a new Meeting Minutes tool that is designed to streamline in-person conversations. This innovative tool automatically generates summaries by utilizing speaker recognition technology, thereby enhancing efficiency in creating deliverables. This tool is a one-stop workflow solution for recording meetings and producing accurate meeting minutes.

data.title: Catalyx introduces OpenLine Clearance Assistant 3.0 using AI tech to reduce manufacturing bottlenecks in life sciences, Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: Catalyx recently introduced the latest version of its OpenLine Clearance Assistant™, version 3.0, in Newtown, Pennsylvania, on January 14, 2026. This new technology offers breakthrough features aimed at ensuring seamless production flow for life sciences manufacturers. Production bottlenecks have been a significant issue for companies, resulting in substantial losses in productivity, amounting to millions of dollars. By leveraging the advanced capabilities of OpenLine Clearance Assistant™ 3.0, manufacturers can effectively mitigate these disruptions and maintain uninterrupted production processes.

data.title: Earnings scheduled for Jan 14: SemiLEDs, WFC ($1.66/share, $21.65B revenue), C ($1.63/share, $20.65B revenue), BAC ($0.96/share, $27.64B revenue).
data.description: Before the market opens, several companies are scheduled to report their earnings. SemiLEDs (LEDS) is expected to announce its first-quarter results. Wells Fargo (WFC) is projected to report earnings of $1.66 per share with revenue reaching $21.65 billion. Citigroup (C) is estimated to disclose earnings of $1.63 per share on revenue of $20.65 billion. Bank of America (BAC) is likely to report earnings of $0.96 per share with revenue hitting $27.64 billion. For United Community Banks (UCB), further details are available for review on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Revvity stock surges on positive Q4 results, revenue growth of 6%, expecting $772 million in Q4 and $2.855 billion for 2025. Nasdaq and S&P down slightly.
data.description: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) saw its stock price increase on Tuesday following the release of preliminary projections for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025. This positive movement occurred despite a general market downturn, with both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 experiencing minor declines. The broader market exhibited mixed performance, with the Nasdaq down by 0.19% and the S&P 500 declining by 0.20%. Revvity, Inc. announced that the official financial results for Q4 and the full year of 2025 will be disclosed on February 2, 2026. The preliminary earnings for RVTY in Q4 highlighted a 6% revenue growth, with reported revenue expected to be around $772 million, surpassing the consensus estimate of $760.6 million. Additionally, the full-year revenue for 2025 is projected to be approximately $2.855 billion, denoting a 4% year-over-year growth compared to the consensus of $2.84 billion.

data.title: Survey of 400+ supply chain professionals finds modernization focus on connected networks, cloud tech, and AI for resilience, cost savings, and efficiency.
data.description: A recent study of over 400 supply chain experts reveals that connected networks, cloud technology, and AI play crucial roles in enhancing resilience, decreasing costs, and improving efficiency. The survey, conducted in Portsmouth, N.H. on Jan. 14, 2026, provided insights into key practices within the industry. Loftware, a renowned company specializing in product identification and supply chain visibility, spearheaded this initiative.

data.title: Wall Street analysts expect Bank7 Corp. to report Q4 earnings of $1.05/share, down from $1.16/share last year, with estimated revenue of $24.1 million. The stock price fell 0.9% to $42.40.
data.description: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ: BSVN) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Thursday, January 15. Analysts are anticipating an earnings per share of $1.05, depicting a decrease from $1.16 in the same quarter last year. The consensus estimate for the quarter’s revenue is $24.1 million, slightly lower than the previous year's $24.14 million. Bank7 had exceeded expectations with its third-quarter results released on October 15. Despite this, the stock experienced a 0.9% decrease, closing at $42.40 on Tuesday. For more details, interested individuals can refer to Benzinga Pro for the latest analyst ratings.

data.title: Bitcoin drops from its $96.5K peak as experts believe the US tariff decision is already factored in, despite rising geopolitical uncertainties.
data.description: Bitcoin has seen a surge in value this year, reaching yearly price highs. This increase comes despite concerns over potential market volatility linked to developments in Iran, the Federal Reserve, and the US Supreme Court ruling on the legality of trade tariffs.

data.title: More homeowners have mortgages above 6% than below 3%, signaling shift in rate trends. Share rising.
data.description: In the real estate market, the percentage of American homeowners with mortgage rates exceeding 6% has now exceeded those with rates lower than 3%. This shift indicates a significant adjustment as buyers adapt to higher rates. The data, as of January 14, 2026, suggests that the share of mortgages at 6% or higher is on the rise. This trend reflects the evolving landscape as borrowers navigate interest rates in the current market.

data.title: Dispersive® Stealth Networking joins Google Cloud Partner Advantage, offering secure, high-performance connectivity.
data.description: In Atlanta, Dispersive Holdings, Inc. (Dispersive®) revealed that Dispersive® Stealth Networking has gained approval for inclusion in Google Cloud Partner Advantage. This pertains to Google Cloud's worldwide partner network. The strategic move emphasizes Dispersive's commitment to assisting enterprises operating crucial tasks on Google Cloud by providing secure, high-speed connectivity while maintaining network, application, and data privacy.

data.title: Pre-register for Chiplet Summit 2022 at Santa Clara Convention Center on Feb 17-19, focusing on chiplet-based systems.
data.description: A summit focused on Chiplet technology has opened pre-registration for its fourth annual event, scheduled for February 17-19 at the Santa Clara Convention Center. Chiplet adoption among major chipmakers for high-performance purposes is increasing. The summit aims to unite engineers and companies influencing integration advancements. Educational sessions at the event will concentrate on the tools, methods, and platforms relevant to chiplet-based systems.

data.title: RetinalGenix highlights AI-driven retinal mapping study, aiming to combine imaging, genetics & analytics for better health insights.
data.description: RetinalGenix focuses on using cutting-edge technology to explore the potential connection between high-resolution imaging, genetics, and advanced analytics in order to uncover fresh perspectives on ocular and overall health.

data.title: Target unveils Jeremiah Brent Home collection, including 80+ bedding items under $100. Launches Jan. 18 in stores and online.
data.description: Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) has revealed the launch of the Jeremiah Brent Home collection, featuring an impressive 80+ piece exclusive bedding assortment. Most items in this collection are priced at under $100. The collection is set to hit shelves on Jan. 18 across the majority of Target stores and will also be available for purchase on Target.com. This announcement was made in Minneapolis on Jan. 14, 2026.

data.title: Hyperscale Data announces 43 consecutive months of cash dividend payments on Series D stock.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Las Vegas, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), an AI data center company focused on Bitcoin, disclosed that it has effectively issued 43 continuous monthly dividends on its stock.
